label: Overview
title: Overview
description: Section-local registry for the Overview product page. This file defines the internal navigation and anchor structure inside Overview itself, separate from the Products top-bar scope.

page.title: Overview
page.description: ICOS is defined as a new category: a voice-trained reflective cognition system that organizes memory continuity, emotional patterning, profile intelligence, and long-term self-authored development into one governed product architecture.

sections.label: Core Framing
sections.title: Core Framing
sections.description: Defines ICOS as a continuity system rather than a generic chatbot surface, and positions the page as the conceptual framing layer of the product.

sections.label: Release / Version / Status
sections.title: Release / Version / Status
sections.description: Explains the current maturity state, version posture, and staged development status of the product architecture.

sections.label: Usage Layer
sections.title: Usage Layer
sections.description: Describes how a user enters and interacts with ICOS through reflection, capture, continuity review, and long-term profile formation.
